name: Lunch-Box "Handwiches
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Fully cooked ham, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Allow the dough to rise according to package directions.
2. Punch down the dough and divide it into 10 equal pieces.
3. Roll each piece into a 5-inch circle.
4. Place about 1/4 cup ham and 2 tablespoons cheese on each circle; press filling to flatten.
5. Mix egg yolk and water together, then brush onto the edges of the circles.
6. Fold the handwiches into semicircles and pinch the edges to seal them.
7. Brush the tops with the egg yolk mixture.
8. Place the handwiches on an ungreased baking sheet.
9. Bake at 375 degrees for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown. Serve warm or cold. If desired, cool and freeze.
Yields: 10 sandwiches
